## Summary

- What changed?
- Why was this needed?

## Scope

- [ ] Single-purpose change
- [ ] No unrelated refactors mixed in

## Validation

- [ ] CI checks pass
- [ ] Tested locally
- [ ] Tested on staging (if deploy-impacting)

## Test evidence

- Add screenshots/log snippets or short notes proving behavior.

## Risk and rollback

- Risk level: Low / Medium / High
- Rollback plan (if needed):
  - Previous Vercel deployment:
  - Previous Render deployment:

## Checklist

- [ ] No secrets committed
- [ ] Docs updated (if behavior/config changed)
